calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Approving Modification Of Trust Terms Under Probate Code Sections 15403, 15409 (Prob C 17200(B)(13)
Off Calendar Jun-03-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jason Louie, via Zoom, for Stanley Chow, Trustee.

The court advises of its concern with request to alienate assets of the trust. Counsel advises that all parties have been fully noticed and have consented to the modification of the trust. The court confirms with counsel that the parties have been advised of the material change of the trust. Counsel advises that he has spoken to all the family members to apprise them of this matter and offers to file new consents if required by the court. Counsel confirms that the value of the trust is held in properties located in Las Vegas. Counsel confirms that he has not been notified of any objections to this matter and in fact, has been contacted by the family several times to ask for a status of the matter.

The Petition for Order Approving Modification of Trust Terms, etc., is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Martinez. Not Reported.
